themes.exampleQuote: Half of your food is 'Meh', the other half is absolutely terrible.
Special for the weekend were shepherd pie pierogis.. omg.
So yummy and a fun, cozy, unpretentious space.
You guys need to stop overcooking everything.
Place is great and always has events going on.

sentiment_summary: Reviewers consistently rave about the beer selection and value, love the cozy vibe and standout dishes like pierogis, but a vocal critic flags overcooking and overpriced food as real concerns.
notable_quote: Worth the trip out of the 'city' but so lucky bc we live up the street.
